author: jdthomas24
releaseNotes: 1.0.0 Initial release. Local TCP/WebSocket integration for Pentair IntelliCenter pool controllers. Auto-discovers circuits, bodies, pumps, sensors, and chlorinator. Supports pool/spa on-off control, temperature readings, pump RPM and watts, salt chlorinator, and heater control.
description: Local integration for Pentair IntelliCenter pool controllers. Connects directly to your IntelliCenter over your local network via WebSocket — no cloud required. Auto-discovers and creates devices for circuits, pool and spa bodies with temperatures and heater control, pump RPM and wattage, air and solar sensors, and salt chlorinator.
